message:
feat(command+runtime): real-redis parity for COMMAND key specs, MIGRATE, PUBSUB context, CONFIG arity

Brings the runtime and command surfaces closer to the vendored Redis oracle by
(a) teaching fr-command about Redis's full COMMAND key-specification model
(including custom specs and precise per-arg flags), (b) preserving the raw
port argument bytes for MIGRATE so invalid ports round-trip the exact oracle
error, (c) tightening pubsub client-state detection and forbidden-command
error, and (d) giving CONFIG subcommands their own arity-error shape. The
core_* conformance fixtures and smoke harness are updated in lockstep so the
live-Redis diff stays green.

fr-command (crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs):

- MigrateRequest.port changes from u16 to port_arg: Vec<u8> so the raw
  caller-supplied bytes flow into parse_migrate_request / execute_migrate and
  invalid-port errors match Redis byte-for-byte.
- New command key-specification layer
  * KEY_FLAGS_{NONE,RO_ACCESS,RW_ACCESS_UPDATE,OW_UPDATE,OW_INSERT,
    RM_DELETE,RW_ACCESS_DELETE} static flag vocabularies
  * CommandKeyReference { index, flags }
  * CommandKeyLookupError { InvalidCommand, NoKeyArguments,
    InvalidNumberOfArguments, InvalidArguments } and
    command_key_lookup_error_frame translator
  * command_uses_custom_key_specs covering EVAL/EVALSHA(_RO), FCALL(_RO),
    XREAD/XREADGROUP, XSETID, RESTORE etc.
  * command_has_keys gate, command_key_references and
    command_key_references_with_exact_flags used by COMMAND
    GETKEYS/GETKEYSANDFLAGS
- COMMAND subcommand output rewritten to use the new specs (the surrounding
  command_cmd branches shrink significantly)
- del reshaped into a shared delete_keys helper so DEL/UNLINK/RM flows reuse
  one implementation
- Various call-site fixups where the MIGRATE port_arg change ripples
  (dispatch_argv, publish_cmd/spublish_cmd, debug_cmd, wait_cmd, setrange,
  pfdebug_cmd, parse_expire_options)
- Test coverage expanded in the in-file tests module for the new paths

fr-runtime (crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs):

- config_wrong_subcommand_arity helper produces
  "ERR wrong number of arguments for 'config|<sub>' command" matching Redis
- CONFIG_STATIC_PARAMS gains "enable-protected-configs"
- is_pubsub_client now also considers pattern subscriptions
  (server.pubsub_client_patterns) so PSUBSCRIBE-only clients are correctly
  identified
- pubsub_context_error produces the canonical
  "ERR Can't execute '<cmd>': only (P|S)SUBSCRIBE/…/RESET are allowed in
  this context" message

fr-conformance (fixtures + smoke harness):

- core_config.json: reorder CONFIG GET groupings (maxmemory / lazyfree /
  etc.) to match what real Redis returns for alpha-ordered globs
- core_server.json: extend the server-command surface with the newly
  parity-captured responses
- tests/smoke.rs: add core_acl_live_redis_matches_runtime driven by a new
  CORE_ACL_LIVE_STABLE_CASES allowlist and a matching
  CORE_CLIENT_ADMIN_LIVE_STABLE_CASES set, each running the vendored Redis
  oracle and asserting the live diff report has zero failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2573,6 +2573,42 @@ fn core_acl_conformance() {
     assert!(diff.failed.is_empty());
 }
 
+const CORE_ACL_LIVE_STABLE_CASES: &[&str] = &[
+    "acl_whoami_returns_default",
+    "acl_users_returns_default",
+    "acl_setuser_creates_new_user",
+    "acl_deluser_alice_returns_count",
+    "acl_deluser_default_is_rejected",
+    "acl_deluser_nonexistent_returns_zero",
+    "acl_log_returns_empty_array",
+    "acl_log_reset_returns_ok",
+    "acl_unknown_subcommand_is_rejected",
+    "acl_no_subcommand_is_rejected",
+    "acl_genpass_negative_error",
+    "acl_genpass_too_large_error",
+    "acl_whoami_lowercase",
+    "acl_users_lowercase",
+    "acl_setuser_bob_on",
+    "acl_setuser_bob_off",
+    "acl_deluser_bob",
+];
+
+#[test]
+fn core_acl_live_redis_matches_runtime() {
+    let cfg = HarnessConfig::default_paths();
+    let oracle_server = VendoredRedisOracle::start(&cfg);
+    let oracle = LiveOracleConfig {
+        host: "127.0.0.1".to_string(),
+        port: oracle_server.port,
+        ..LiveOracleConfig::default()
+    };
+    let report =
+        run_live_redis_diff_for_cases(&cfg, "core_acl.json", CORE_ACL_LIVE_STABLE_CASES, &oracle)
+            .expect("acl live diff");
+    assert_eq!(report.total, report.passed, "failed: {:?}", report.failed);
+    assert!(report.failed.is_empty());
+}
+
